chin_hakha.sr_imported: Organizer kan la lut — atu ah nangmah ta ah ser
chin_hakha.sr_reset: Arrangement kha a hlanmi lim ah ṭhan ret
chin_hakha.sculpt_engine_failed: Sculpting engine load khawh a si lo.
chin_hakha.sculpt_failed: Sculpting a tlin lo — a fawi deuhmi description in i zuam.
chin_hakha.assess_failed: Coach nih a leh khawh lo — ṭhan i zuam.
chin_hakha.sr_assessed: Coach lehnak cu builder panel tang ah a timhcia cang
chin_hakha.recall_needs_more: Hmasa ah group 2 chungah ruahnak 4 tluk belh hna
chin_hakha.sr_recall_started: Recall mode: ruahnak vialte tray chungah an tla. Pakhat cio kha an hmun ah ṭhan chiah hna.
chin_hakha.sr_recall_complete: Na vawlei pumpi kha philhnak in ṭhan na tuah!
chin_hakha.snapshot_failed: Hi ah 3D view tlaih khawh a si lo.
chin_hakha.print_saved: One-pager download cang — hong hna i print
chin_hakha.print_failed: One-pager ser khawh a si lo.
chin_hakha.import_replaces: Hi nih na composition tuchanmi kha a thlen lai.
chin_hakha.title: Form Zalonline
chin_hakha.tagline: Na Form Vawlei kha ser: archetypal structure thim, na ruahnak he khat, 3D ah chiah, cun a biapimi kha sculpt.
chin_hakha.tagline2: Hi ah nangmah cu ca ṭialtu na si — AI cu na hal tikah lawng a bawmh.
chin_hakha.keep_content_hint: Na group le na ruahnak an um rih — form thim nih hmun saibawnnak lawng a thlen.
chin_hakha.recall_title: Recall: na vawlei kha ṭhan ser
chin_hakha.undo_tip: Thlennak a hnu bik kha ṭhan tuah (Ctrl+Z)
chin_hakha.print_tip: Print khawhmi one-pager download (snapshot + na ruahnak hna + coach lehnak)
chin_hakha.recall_tip: Na ruahnak hna tray ah an tla — philhnak in ṭhan chiah hna
chin_hakha.assess_tip: AI coach kha na composition pumpi zoh awkah hal
chin_hakha.recall_instructions: Ruahnak vialte an hmun in tang tray ah an tla. Hmun ah ruahnak pakhat thim, cun inn ah thlah awkah group chips (asiloah [ le ] keys) hmang. Lentecelh lio ah zeihmanh chiah a si lo.
chin_hakha.recall_complete: na vawlei pumpi kha ṭhan na tuah!
chin_hakha.title_placeholder: Hi vawlei hi zeikong dah a si?
chin_hakha.note_label: Nangmah caah note (3D ah a langh)
chin_hakha.note_placeholder: Zeicah hi ruahnak hi hi ah a um?
chin_hakha.no_3d: Hi ah 3D space load a si lo — na builder panel cu rian a ṭuan rih, na ṭialmi vialte an chiah.
chin_hakha.stage_hint: Hmun ah: ruahnak chiah awkah hnen · hrik awkah background hnen · zoom awkah scroll · [ le ] nih thimmi ruahnak kha group karlak ah a thlak.
chin_hakha.suggestions: A ra lai tuahnak kalhmun hna
